adversarial-tester.reason: Well-scoped behavioral testing distinct from red-team (artifacts) and inquisitor (cross-component). Clear distinction table, concrete 6-step process, properly integrated as build Phase 3 component.

assay.reason: Unique approach-evaluation role consumed by design, spec, and migrate. Well-structured invocation API with kill criteria and confidence scoring. Evidence-grounding requirement prevents vague recommendations.

audit.reason: Find-and-report adversarial review across 4 artifact types with tailored lens configurations. Distinct from quality-gate (which fixes) and siege (security-specific). Dispatches recon for scoping.

build.reason: Core pipeline orchestrator — design through execution with quality gates. Central hub dispatching to most other skills. Pipeline-active markers, token tracking, and resume via replay.

cartographer-skill.reason: Persistent codebase knowledge accumulation across sessions. Three modes (Record, Consult, Load). Defect signature system is mature. Complementary with forge (process wisdom vs domain wisdom).

checkpoint.reason: Shadow git infrastructure consumed by build, quality-gate, debugging, and replay for pipeline rollback. Essential for replay to function.

code-review.reason: Iterative fresh-reviewer review with external model review integration. Clear integration with build pipeline and standalone use. Distinct from red-team.

consensus.reason: Multi-model consensus amplifier with clean opt-in design and 4-level graceful degradation. Referenced via MCP tool, not crucible: dispatch. External review bridge on eligible rounds.

debugging.reason: Root-cause-first pipeline with orchestrator-never-reads-code discipline. Phase 4.5 blast radius scan with defect signature persistence. Pipeline-active markers for crash detection.

design.reason: Investigation-backed interactive design with triage tiers. Dispatches recon (Phase 2), assay (Deep Dive synthesis), with Open Questions context. Grain test for data models. Cascading context.

distill.reason: Unique document-to-markdown conversion for LLM token efficiency. 13+ formats, 3 conversion tiers, 20-30% digest compression.

finish.reason: Branch completion workflow with mandatory review and red-team before integration options. Prevents premature merges.

forge.reason: Directory renamed from forge-skill to match frontmatter name. Retrospective, feed-forward, mutation proposals, chronicle signals with efficiency sub-object.

getting-started.reason: Meta-skill establishing skill-first discipline with decision table and red flags. Essential for bypass prevention.

innovate.reason: Single-shot divergent creativity injection with clear scope boundaries. YAGNI gating delegated to red-team.

inquisitor.reason: Cross-component bug hunting via 5 adversarial dimensions. Clearly distinct from adversarial-tester (per-task) and red-team (artifact review). Build Phase 4.

migrate.reason: Autonomous migration with blast-radius mapping and phased execution. Dispatches recon (consumer-registry) and assay (strategy evaluation at User Gate). Pipeline-active markers.

mock-to-unity.reason: Unity-specific mockup-to-USS translation with translation map and layered implementation.

mockup-builder.reason: Theme.uss-constrained HTML mockup creation ensuring USS feasibility. Paired with mock-to-unity and ui-verify.

parallel.reason: Examples use pre-dispatch-convention Task tool patterns. Needs update to reference shared/dispatch-convention.md and use disk-mediated dispatch examples.

planning.reason: Implementation plan writing with bite-sized TDD task granularity. Distinct from design (exploration) and build (execution).

prd.reason: Focused PRD generation from design docs. Clear derivation principle. Called by build Phase 1.

project-init.reason: Cold-start elimination via proactive codebase mapping. Two tiers. Output feeds cartographer. Complementary with recon.

prospector.reason: Organic architecture friction discovery with competing redesign proposals. Distinct from audit (bugs vs structural improvements). Focus modes add targeting.

quality-gate.reason: Core iterative red-teaming with stagnation detection, consensus integration, external model review, and fix journals. Central infrastructure skill.

recall.reason: Well-formed session history query skill with 4 modes. But zero skills dispatch crucible:recall despite Integration section claiming pipeline skills can use it. Wire into build/debugging compaction recovery procedures.

recon.reason: Structured parallel investigation with 6 depth modules and session-level caching. Called by design, spec, migrate, and audit. Also usable standalone.

red-team.reason: Iterative adversarial review with fresh-eyes-per-round and weighted stagnation. Distinct from quality-gate (which wraps red-team). Standalone and pipeline use.

replay.reason: Pipeline resume and A/B experimentation via manifest analysis and checkpoint correlation. Branch guard prevents cross-branch contamination. Thorough edge case handling.

review-feedback.reason: Behavioral discipline preventing performative agreement and blind implementation. Source-specific handling. YAGNI check. Unique.

siege.reason: 6-perspective security audit with persistent threat model. Content-aware activation heuristic prevents false positives. Distinct from audit and red-team.

skill-creator.reason: Upstream Anthropic skill with different tone. Covers green-field skill creation which forge does not. Add integration note clarifying relationship with forge mutation proposals.

spec.reason: Autonomous epic-to-specs pipeline with wave processing, confidence-routed alerting, and machine-readable contracts. Dispatches recon and assay. Distinct from design (interactive).

stocktake.reason: Meta-skill for auditing skill health. Quick-scan, full, and efficiency report modes. Integrated with forge feed-forward for staleness nudging.

test-coverage.reason: Test alignment audit for stale assertions, dead code, coincidence tests. Distinct from adversarial-tester (new tests) and TDD (process).

test-driven-development.reason: Core TDD Iron Law enforcement with rationalization prevention. Essential implementation skill referenced by build and others.

ui-verify.reason: Unity UI drift detection completing the mockup-builder → mock-to-unity → ui-verify pipeline.

verify.reason: Evidence-before-claims discipline enforcement. Iron Law, rationalization prevention. Distinct from finish (full workflow).

worktree.reason: Git worktree management with safety verification. Called by design and build for workspace isolation.
